Perfect! I have completed the search and collected all the CSS variable definitions and theme files. Let me provide you with a comprehensive summary.

## CSS Variable Definitions & Theme Files - Complete Report

I found a comprehensive CSS variable system defined in the main global stylesheet. There are NO Tailwind configurations in this project. Here are the findings:

### Main Global CSS File
**Location:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`

This is the primary theme file containing all CSS custom property definitions with both light and dark theme support.

#### Light Theme (Default `:root`)
```css
/* ── Semantic color tokens ── */
--bg-primary: #ffffff
--bg-secondary: rgb(250, 250, 250)
--bg-hover: rgb(245, 245, 245)
--bg-elevated: rgb(255, 255, 255)
--bg-backdrop: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23)
--bg-backdrop-heavy: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.575)
--bg-overlay: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.089)
--bg-pill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)
--bg-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23)
--bg-glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)

--text-primary: rgb(4, 20, 29)
--text-heading: rgb(15, 23, 30)
--text-secondary: rgb(75, 75, 75)
--text-body: rgb(100, 100, 100)
--text-muted: rgb(130, 130, 130)
--text-faint: rgb(150, 150, 150)
--text-separator: rgb(190, 190, 190)

--border-light: rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)
--border-card: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)

--shadow-card: 2px 2px 10px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.182)
--shadow-modal: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)

--accent-purple: rgb(94, 66, 255)
--accent-dark: rgb(4, 20, 29)
--accent-dark-hover: rgb(16, 56, 79)

--icon-default: #5e5e5eff
--icon-view: #00000044
--icon-view-count: #00000099

--font-serif: "Lora", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif
```

#### Dark Theme (`[data-theme="dark"]`)

```css
--accent-dark: rgb(225, 225, 225)
--accent-dark-hover: rgb(180, 180, 180)

--bg-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)
--bg-glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)

--icon-view: #ffffff44

```

### CSS Files Using These Variables
The following 16 CSS files extensively use the CSS custom properties:

1. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css** - Main global theme file
2. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\postcards.css** - Post cards styling
3. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\ContentViewer\contentviewer.css** - Content viewer styling
4. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\ProfilePostCards\profilepostcards.css** - Profile post cards
5. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\comments\comments.css** - Comments section
6. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Notifications\notification.css** - Notifications
7. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\VisitProfile\VisitProfile.css** - Profile visiting
8. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\myprofile.css** - My profile page
9. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\sidebar.css** - Sidebar navigation
10. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SidebarOpinions\sidebarOpinions.css** - Opinions sidebar
11. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\home.css** - Home page layout
12. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\MobileSidebarLink\mobilesidebarlink.css** - Mobile sidebar
13. **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\mobileNavLink\mobilenavlink.css** - Mobile navigation

### Key CSS Variables Being Used
Variables actively used across components:
- **Backgrounds:** `--bg-primary`, `--bg-secondary`, `--bg-hover`, `--bg-elevated`, `--bg-backdrop`, `--bg-pill`, `--bg-glass`, `--bg-overlay`
- **Text Colors:** `--text-primary`, `--text-heading`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-body`, `--text-muted`, `--text-faint`, `--text-separator`
- **Borders:** `--border-light`, `--border-card`
- **Shadows:** `--shadow-card`, `--shadow-modal`
- **Accents:** `--accent-purple`, `--accent-dark`, `--accent-dark-hover`
- **Fonts:** `--font-serif`
- **Icon Colors:** `--icon-default`, `--icon-view`, `--icon-view-count`

### No Tailwind Configuration Found
No `tailwind.config.js`, `postcss.config.js`, or similar configuration files exist in the project. This is a pure CSS custom properties (CSS variables) based design system.
